overall.description: First-person walking perspective along a highway shoulder in GTA V, transitioning from overcast dusk to golden hour sunset. The camera moves steadily forward along the gravel shoulder as various vehicles pass by on the multi-lane highway, with rocky hills and transmission towers lining the route.

events.description: large red semi-truck passes by on the right side of the highway
sun becomes visible through breaking clouds, transitioning from overcast to direct lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the gravel shoulder next to the highway

notable_agents.action: red semi-truck overtaking at high speed
white box truck with 'BIG GOODS' text passing by

entered.detail: gravel and dirt shoulder alongside the highway
multi-lane asphalt highway with white lane markings
steep rocky hill with sparse dry bushes and small trees
steep rocky embankment on the far side of the highway
tall metal electricity pylons visible against the gray sky
bright sun becoming visible through the cloud cover

segments.scene_description: Walking along a highway shoulder during overcast dusk conditions. The scene features rocky hills on both sides and transmission towers in the distance. A large red semi-truck and a white goods truck pass by on the highway. Around the 12-second mark, the sun breaks through the clouds, brightening the scene significantly.

events.description: camera passes a large road sign on the left shoulder

agents.ego_description: continuing along the shoulder in bright sunlight, approaching and passing a road sign

notable_agents.action: white and yellow food truck driving along the highway
blue and white tour bus visible in the distance

entered.detail: large rectangular highway sign mounted on a metal pole

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the highway shoulder under bright direct sunlight as the sky clears. The camera approaches and passes a road sign on the left. Various vehicles including a food truck and tour bus pass by on the highway. The transmission towers shift to the left side of the frame as the camera moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway shoulder during golden hour sunset

events.description: sun drops lower toward the horizon creating golden hour lighting with long shadows

agents.ego_description: walking toward the setting sun with warm golden light illuminating the scene

segments.scene_description: The final segment features golden hour lighting as the sun sets on the right side of the frame. The camera has passed the road sign and continues along the shoulder. The left rocky hillside appears closer in the frame, and the warm sunset light casts long shadows across the highway. Traffic continues to flow steadily on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a highway shoulder that transforms from a gloomy, overcast dusk into a vibrant golden hour sunset. It begins under a gray sky with rocky hills and distant transmission towers as a red semi-truck and a white goods truck pass by. As the sun breaks through the clouds, the scene brightens significantly, leading the camera past a roadside sign while a food truck and tour bus stream past on the highway. The environment then shifts as the transmission towers move to the left and the sky clears completely, allowing direct sunlight to flood the landscape. Finally, the lighting deepens into warm golden tones with the setting sun appearing on the right, casting long shadows across the road as the rocky hillside closes in on the left.
